title: Batman4521W's scythe mod
description: adds a scythe with a lifesteal enchant
body:
adds a scythe with the lifesteal enchantment.
this mod was made by me and is my first mod.
this mod has no dependencies and is great for people who want a simple mod with only the scythe along with lifesteal enchantment.
the lifesteal mod gives the player health when an entity is attacked.
the amount of health gained depends on the level of enchantment.
lifesteal enchantment cannot be found in villager trades but can be found in the enchanting table and the loot tables.
the scythe can only be crafted using three iron and two sticks refer the gallery for exact recipe.
